example_1_default_behavior.description: Run all stages with notifications (notifications_enabled omitted - defaults to true)

example_2_explicit_notifications_enabled.description: Run all stages with email notifications explicitly enabled

example_3_disable_notifications.description: Run all stages but disable all email notifications

example_4_skip_build_notifications_omitt.description: Skip crawler build and cluster creation, notifications enabled by default (parameter omitted)

example_5_only_crawling_no_notifications.description: Run only crawling stages without any notifications

example_6_minimal_testing.description: Skip all stages and notifications - useful for testing the pipeline flow

example_7_minimal_input.description: Minimal valid input - runs all stages with notifications (all defaults)

example_8_empty_stages.description: Empty stages object - runs all stages with notifications
